texto: repeat after me:1. our immigrant families are not just ‘homophobic’ they are also ‘colonized.’2. our parents have histories, genders, and sexualities, too.3. they are just as broken as we are (but we have the words — i mean the english — to say it)4. the diaspora responds to racism with heteronormativity5. trauma seeps through generations
explicacao: Citação de Darkmatter sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “repeat after me:1. our immigrant families are not just ‘homophobic’ they are also ‘colonized.’2. …” articula reflexao, colonialism, generation-gap em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e generation-gap.
